steps.causal_note: Arithmetic depended on the packet rows extracted in step 1.
steps.input: {"command": "node - <<'NODE'\\nconst options = {\\n  A: {strength:500, density:2.7, cost:16},\\n  B: {strength:900, density:4.4, cost:26},\\n  C: {strength:716, density:1.8, cost:40},\\n};\\nconst s = Object.values(options).map(o=>o.strength);\\nconst d = Object.values(options).map(o=>o.density);\\nconst c = Object.values(options).map(o=>o.cost);\\nconst min = a=>Math.min(...a), max=a=>Math.max(...a);\\nconst sr=[min(s),max(s)], dr=[min(d),max(d)], cr=[min(c),max(c)];\\nfor (const [k,o] of Object.entries(options)) {\\n  const strength=(o.strength-sr[0])/(sr[1]-sr[0]);\\n  const mass=(dr[1]-o.density)/(dr[1]-dr[0]);\\n  const cost=(cr[1]-o.cost)/(cr[1]-cr[0]);\\n  const total = strength*0.4 + mass*0.3 + cost*0.2;\\n  console.log(k, {strength, mass, cost, total});\\n}\\nNODE"}

task: Advanced task: Aircraft composite repair disposition aid. Materials packet: option A strength=500MPa density=2.7 cost=16/kg; option B strength=900MPa density=4.4 cost=26/kg; option C strength=716MPa density=1.8 cost=40/kg. Score strength 40%, mass 30%, cost 20%, manufacturability 10%. Produce the stated deliverable with calculations, assumptions, exceptions, and exact row/value citations. Do not invent additional records; mark missing inputs as needs_review. Include intermediate calculations, uncertainty or sensitivity notes, validation checks, and a final decision table that ties every recommendation back to the supplied values. The response should be executable from the embedded packet alone, with no external data lookup required beyond understanding the cited public removed context.
